defaultAlias.description: Alias used when no classification is available. Must be a key in `aliases`.

aliases.description: Map of alias name to concrete provider/model reference (e.g. 'anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6').

classificationRules.description: Map of classifier tier ('simple'|'medium'|'complex') to alias.

mode.description: Classifier implementation. 'heuristic' uses cheap pattern matching; 'llm' calls a classifier model (Phase-2 follow-up).

model.description: Model used when mode='llm'. Ignored in heuristic mode.

sensitivity.description: Sensitivity policy. Keys are sensitivity labels, values gate allowed providers and/or force an alias.

defaultSensitivity.description: Sensitivity label applied when the request does not declare one. Defaults to 'internal'.

escalationThreshold.description: Confidence floor. Requests below this threshold escalate one alias up the ladder.

budgetCeilingUsdPerRequest.description: Abort a request if the estimated per-request cost exceeds this value.

logsDir.description: Directory for routing decision logs. Default: ~/.openclaw/logs/aj-router.
